overall.description: A slow first-person walk through a historic cemetery at night, illuminated by moonlight and warm lanterns. The camera approaches and circles a prominent Harris family mausoleum before continuing down narrow paths between stone tombs. High-quality game engine footage with cinematic atmosphere reminiscent of Red Dead Redemption 2.

events.description: slight turn to center the Harris mausoleum in the frame
approaching warm lantern light near the Harris tomb

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the cemetery grounds, approaching the large Harris family mausoleum

entered.detail: Large stone mausoleum with cross monument on top and arched inscription panel
Tall gothic spire visible in the distance against the night sky
Various smaller grave markers and headstones throughout the cemetery grounds
Bright full moon visible through scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide view of a historic cemetery at night, with the camera walking steadily toward a prominent Harris family mausoleum. The full moon illuminates the scene from above while a distant church spire rises on the left. The atmosphere is quiet and atmospheric, with tombstones scattered across the grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: close inspection of Harris mausoleum with lantern illumination

events.description: begins circling around the Harris mausoleum to view different angles
passing close to an iron street lamp casting warm yellow light on the stone

agents.ego_description: circling the Harris tombstone to read the inscription and examine architectural details closely

entered.detail: Ornate black iron lamp post with warm yellow glow illuminating the tombstone

segments.scene_description: The camera moves close to the Harris mausoleum, circling the structure to reveal detailed inscriptions and the cross monument atop it. Warm light from a nearby iron street lamp casts dramatic shadows across the stone surface. The church spire fades from view as the camera focuses on the tomb's details.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cemetery path between tall family mausoleums

events.description: entering narrow corridor between high stone mausoleum walls
slight turn to approach the tall obelisk monument head-on

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow path between mausoleums, heading toward a tall obelisk monument in the distance

entered.detail: Tall stone column with statue on top, visible at the end of the path
Red brick tomb structure with metal gate and ornate roof
Stone steps leading up to a raised tomb platform

segments.scene_description: Leaving the Harris mausoleum behind, the camera enters a narrow path flanked by tall stone tombs and a red brick mausoleum. The space becomes more enclosed as the camera approaches a tall obelisk monument ahead. Warm light glows from within a mausoleum on the right, contrasting with the cool moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit historic cemetery that shifts from an open landscape to a narrow, enclosed corridor of stone. It begins with a steady walk across the wide grounds toward the prominent Harris family mausoleum, with a distant church spire silhouetted against the full moon. As the camera reaches the structure, it circles the mausoleum to reveal detailed inscriptions and a crowning cross, while the lighting transitions from cool moonlight to the dramatic, warm glow of a nearby iron street lamp. The scene then shifts away from the tomb and enters a tightening path flanked by tall stone monuments and a red brick mausoleum. Finally, the space becomes increasingly confined as the camera advances toward a towering obelisk, with warm light emanating from a nearby vault contrasting against the surrounding night.
